name: Lighter Chicken Waldorf Salad
recipeIngredient: 3/4 lb Roasted chicken breast (2 Boneless, skinless halves)
1 medium Granny Smith apples, cored and diced into 1/2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the cooked chicken. Combine with the apple, celery, mango and candied ginger.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the mayonnaise, sour cream, lime juice, chutney and mustard; mix well. Add to the salad, mixing well. Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.
3. Just before serving, stir in the chopped walnuts and mint.
Note: Waldorf salad is typically chock full of fat; this one has some fat, but less fat than the traditional recipe. Candied or sugared ginger can be found in the Asian section of major supermarkets.
